color.$description: Palette — The Vault brand system (design.md v1.1.0). Primitives: vault/orange/cyan/neutral/green/red/amber. Semantics: Dot Notation + Voyager transactional tokens

vault-100.$description: Vault tint 1 — near-white lavender, ghost hover backgrounds

vault-200.$description: Vault tint 2 — light lavender, selected state backgrounds

vault-700.$description: Vault Mid (#3B1782) — gradient end, link color, action primary interactive

vault-800.$description: Vault Dark (#2E0F70) — overlays, hover states on dark surfaces

vault-900.$description: THE VAULT (#22005C) — BRAND ANCHOR. Navigation, primary CTAs, header, sidebar background, card accent border

vault-1000.$description: Vault deep 1 — darkest interactive vault tone

vault-1200.$description: Vault deep 3 — near black with vault hue

orange-100.$description: En Vivo tint 1 — urgent surface, countdown background

orange-200.$description: En Vivo tint 2 — subtle urgency fill

orange-300.$description: En Vivo tint 3 — light urgency interactive

orange-400.$description: En Vivo tint 4 — medium urgency fill

orange-600.$description: EN VIVO (#ED8936) — ANCHOR. Live auction badges, urgent status, CTA accent, imminent timer

cyan-600.$description: NEGOCIABLE (#00CACE) — ANCHOR. Negotiable status, interactive highlights, info state

neutral-100.$description: Neutral 1 (#F8FAF9) — Level 0 page background. Warm off-white base canvas

neutral-200.$description: Neutral 2 (#F2F4F3) — Level 1 section background. Sub-sections, sidebar content, tinted wrappers

neutral-300.$description: Neutral 3 — subtle border alternative, hover on surfaces

neutral-400.$description: Neutral 4 (#E1E3E2) — Input field background, skeleton base

neutral-500.$description: Neutral 5 (#D1D5DC) — Skeleton / inactive elements, closed badge background

neutral-700.$description: Neutral 7 (#99A1AF) — Price label text, muted icons, placeholder text anchor

neutral-900.$description: Neutral 9 (#494550) — BODY TEXT ANCHOR. Card body text, secondary content, form descriptions

neutral-1100.$description: Neutral 11 — deep gray, high contrast secondary

neutral-1200.$description: Neutral 12 (#191C1C) — ON SURFACE ANCHOR. Primary text — never use pure black

green-600.$description: SUCCESS (#22C55E) — ANCHOR. Successful bid, confirmed action, market bullish signal

red-600.$description: LIVE (#EF4444) — ANCHOR. Animated dot on live auction banners. Red = error signal ONLY, never urgency/countdown

red-900.$description: ERROR (#BA1A1A) — ANCHOR. Failed bid, rejected action, form errors

amber-600.$description: WARNING (#FFA000) — ANCHOR. Near-expiry alert, attention needed

base-white.$description: Absolute white #FFFFFF — Level 2 card; inverse text/icon on Vault (semantic layer references this, never raw white)

base-black.$description: Absolute black #000000 — scrim base only; never body text (No Black Rule)

vault-utility-ghost.$description: The Vault #22005C at 10% — ghost border (DESIGN.md utility)

vault-utility-divider.$description: The Vault #22005C at 5% — section row divider

red-utility-error-ghost.$description: Error #BA1A1A at 50% — input error ghost border

neutral-utility-muted.$description: Same chroma as neutral-900 at 50% alpha — tertiary / muted body (DESIGN.md Muted)

neutral-utility-label.$description: Same chroma as neutral-900 at 40% alpha — form labels (DESIGN.md Label)

neutral-utility-badge-closed.$description: CERRADO badge fill (#9CA3AF) — single primitive; semantics alias only

base-inverse-muted.$description: White 60% — secondary text on Vault/sidebar (DESIGN.md On Dark Muted)

base-inverse-subtle.$description: White 30% — tertiary on dark surfaces (DESIGN.md On Dark Subtle)

background.$description: Semantic background tokens — light mode surface hierarchy from design.md

primary.$description: Page canvas (#F8FAF9) — Level 0 base page background

secondary.$description: Section background (#F2F4F3) — Level 1, sub-sections, sidebar content areas

tertiary.$description: Tertiary surface — nested containers, table row hover

brand.$description: Brand surface (#22005C) — sidebar, header, footer, primary CTAs

interactive.$description: Interactive element rest background — ghost hover on vault surfaces

interactive-selected.$description: Selected item background (nav item, list row)

card.$description: Card surface (#FFFFFF) — Level 2 via primitive base-white

input.$description: Input field fill (#E1E3E2) — no border at rest per design.md

low.$description: Low urgency surface — standard countdown background

text.$description: Semantic text tokens — design.md text color system. No pure black rule enforced

primary.$description: Primary text (#191C1C) — paragraphs, table content. Never #000000

secondary.$description: Secondary text (#494550) — card body, secondary content, descriptions

tertiary.$description: Muted text (#494550 at 50%) — subtitles, secondary labels via neutral-utility-muted

inverse.$description: Inverse text (#FFFFFF) — text on dark (vault/sidebar) surfaces via base-white

brand-hover.$description: Link text (#3B1782) — clickable links, interactive text

placeholder.$description: Placeholder text (#494550 at 40%) — form labels / placeholders via neutral-utility-label

price-label.$description: Price label text (#99A1AF) — 'PRECIO BASE' label above price amount

on-dark-muted.$description: Secondary text on dark surfaces (#FFFFFF at 60%) — sidebar nav default

on-dark-subtle.$description: Tertiary text on dark surfaces (#FFFFFF at 30%) — sidebar footer

bullish.$description: Market bullish text (#22C55E) — positive price movement

bearish.$description: Market bearish text (#EF4444) — negative price movement

border.$description: Semantic border tokens — design.md No-Line Rule: only ghost borders permitted for functional separation

default.$description: Ghost Border (#22005C at 10%) — only permitted functional border per No-Line Rule

subtle.$description: Section Divider (#22005C at 5%) — subtle row separators, compact list items

strong.$description: Strong border — full vault color for card signature bottom border (upcoming)

brand.$description: Brand border (#22005C) — nav active indicator, selected state border

focus.$description: Focus ring (#3B1782) — 2px solid, 2px offset on all interactive elements

error.$description: Error border (#BA1A1A at 50%) — input error state ghost border

verified.$description: Verified border (#00CACE) — DataQualityBadge high state, verified thumbnails

primary.$description: Primary icon (#191C1C) — default icon fill on light surfaces

secondary.$description: Secondary icon (#494550) — supporting icons, decorative elements

tertiary.$description: Tertiary icon (#99A1AF) — muted icons, inactive states

inverse.$description: Inverse icon (#FFFFFF) — icons on dark/vault surfaces via base-white

brand.$description: Brand icon (#22005C) — search icon in fields, vault-colored icons

success.$description: Success icon (#22C55E) — success state, DataQualityBadge high

status.$description: Status semantic tokens — maps to design.md Section 6 status colors

live.$description: Live indicator (#EF4444) — animated dot on EN VIVO badges. Red = live/active, NOT urgency

error.$description: Error (#BA1A1A) — failed bid, rejected action, form error

urgent.$description: Urgent (#ED8936) — imminent timer (< 5min), countdown urgency. Orange NOT red — red is error only

badge.$description: Badge variant tokens — background + text pairs per design.md Section 9.4

text.$description: NEGOCIABLE badge text (#22005C) — dark on light cyan

card.$description: Card Signature Finish tokens — 4px solid bottom border per design.md No-Line Rule exception

timer.$description: Voyager countdown timer state tokens — design.md Section 9.8

standard.$description: Standard timer text (#191C1C) — countdown above 5min, normal auction pace

imminent.$description: Imminent timer text (#ED8936) — countdown under 5min. ORANGE not red — red = error only

bid.$description: Bid button base (#22005C) — use Vault Gradient in CSS: linear-gradient(135deg, #22005C 0%, #3B1782 100%)

processing.$description: Processing surface (#E0FEFF) — bid submission in progress, negotiation active state

font.$description: Font family primitives — 3 typefaces with distinct roles (IB Fundamentos). DESIGN.md (Stitch) alinea principalmente color; tipografía sigue este modelo salvo decisión explícita

display.$description: Display and UI font — headings, labels, CTAs, navigation. Communicates brand, modernity, premium trust

body.$description: Body and data font — paragraphs, table content, metadata, form text. Communicates legibility, density, technical precision

mono.$description: Numeric font — prices, countdown timers, bid amounts, lot codes. Eliminates jitter on WebSocket updates via native monospaced layout

weight.$description: Font weight scale — 5 steps covering all text roles in the system

light.$description: Light — soft secondary labels on dark surfaces (e.g. 'Bienvenido,' in LoginButton)

regular.$description: Regular — body copy, form text, metadata

medium.$description: Medium — UI labels, nav items, chip text

semibold.$description: Semibold — headings, section titles, card headers

bold.$description: Bold — CTAs, emphasized labels, nicknames, prices

text.$description: Typography composite tokens — 20 locked text styles. No component creates new styles outside this set

display-xl.$description: Display XL — hero headlines, major auction event titles. Plus Jakarta Sans 48/56 w700

display-lg.$description: Display LG — section hero titles, prominent page headings. Plus Jakarta Sans 40/48 w700

display-md.$description: Display MD — modal headings, feature section titles. Plus Jakarta Sans 32/40 w600

heading-xl.$description: Heading XL — primary page headings, auction lot titles. Plus Jakarta Sans 28/36 w600

heading-lg.$description: Heading LG — section headings, card headers. Plus Jakarta Sans 24/32 w600

heading-md.$description: Heading MD — subsection titles, dialog headings. Plus Jakarta Sans 20/28 w600

heading-sm.$description: Heading SM — widget titles, grouped form section labels. Plus Jakarta Sans 18/24 w500

body-lg.$description: Body LG — lead copy, prominent descriptions. Roboto 18/28 w400

body-md.$description: Body MD — standard body text, form input text, table cell content. Roboto 16/24 w400

body-sm.$description: Body SM — supporting copy, secondary descriptions, helper text. Roboto 14/20 w400

label-lg.$description: Label LG — button labels, prominent form labels, nav items. Plus Jakarta Sans 16/24 w500

label-md.$description: Label MD — standard form labels, table column headers, chip labels. Plus Jakarta Sans 14/20 w500

label-sm.$description: Label SM — badge labels, tag text, compact UI labels. Plus Jakarta Sans 12/16 w500

caption.$description: Caption — footnotes, image captions, secondary metadata. Roboto 12/16 w400

overline.$description: Overline — category labels, section type indicators. Roboto 10/14 w500 uppercase tracking+0.08em

numeric-xl.$description: Numeric XL — live bid price in active auction. Roboto Mono 40/48 w700 tabular-nums

numeric-lg.$description: Numeric LG — current price in auction card. Roboto Mono 32/40 w600 tabular-nums

numeric-md.$description: Numeric MD — countdown timer display. Roboto Mono 24/32 w500 tabular-nums

numeric-sm.$description: Numeric SM — table data values, vehicle spec numbers. Roboto Mono 16/24 w400 tabular-nums

numeric-xs.$description: Numeric XS — lot IDs, VIN fragments, metadata codes. Roboto Mono 12/16 w400 tabular-nums

space.$description: Spacing scale — Atlassian multiplier model. space.100 = 8px base unit. Use these tokens exclusively; never raw pixel values

025.$description: space.025 — 2px. Icon-to-text gap, hairline padding inside dense badges

050.$description: space.050 — 4px. Tight intra-component gap, icon padding

100.$description: space.100 — 8px. BASE UNIT. Standard gap between related elements

150.$description: space.150 — 12px. Card internal padding, list item gap

200.$description: space.200 — 16px. Standard component internal padding, grid gap

300.$description: space.300 — 24px. Section horizontal padding, hero padding

400.$description: space.400 — 32px. Section vertical padding, between sections

800.$description: space.800 — 64px. Header height, sidebar brand area height

radius.$description: Border radius scale — 5 steps. Sharp edges dominate: financial platform precision over consumer softness

none.$description: radius.none — 0px. Tables, data cells — never rounded

sm.$description: radius.sm — 4px. DEFAULT. Cards, badges, inputs, buttons, sections — almost everything

full.$description: radius.full — 9999px. Icon buttons circular (28×28, 48×48), pill badges

shadow.$description: Elevation shadows — exactly 2 permitted per design.md. No generic box-shadow values allowed

sm.$description: shadow.sm — Card shadow, brand-tinted (0 8px 16px rgba(34,0,92,0.06)). All cards at rest — Vault tinted elevation

md.$description: shadow.md — Floating shadow (0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)). Active/hover cards, modals, popovers

motion.$description: Motion tokens — 4 duration levels + 2 easing curves. Financial UI: motion serves clarity, never decoration

instant.$description: motion.duration.instant — 0ms. WebSocket price/timer updates. NO fade-in: instant data = trust in data freshness

fast.$description: motion.duration.fast — 100ms. Micro-interactions: hover states, button presses, checkbox toggles

moderate.$description: motion.duration.moderate — 220ms. Component transitions: modal open/close, dropdown expand, drawer slide

slow.$description: motion.duration.slow — 350ms. Page-level transitions, skeleton to content reveal

standard.$description: motion.easing.standard — cubic-bezier(0.3, 0, 0, 1). General-purpose easing per design.md

entrance.$description: motion.easing.entrance — cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1). Elements entering the screen: modals, drawers, notifications
